summary: Language switching bug fix VERIFIED. The main bug (English US/UK selection not changing language from French) is FIXED. All language switching functionality works correctly. Minor fix applied: added missing English translations for 'alreadyHaveAccount', 'loginToAccess', and 'common.login' keys in en.json.
passed_tests: Language switching from French to English (US) - PASS
Language switching from French to English (UK/GB) - PASS
Language persistence after page reload (localStorage i18nextLng) - PASS
English translations display correctly on Landing page (hero, pricing, zones, footer) - PASS
Login page displays in English when English is selected - PASS
Register page (/register/user) displays in English when English is selected - PASS
Switching back from English to French works correctly - PASS
localStorage correctly stores language code (en, en-GB, fr) - PASS
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json - Added missing translations: common.login, auth.register.alreadyHaveAccount, auth.register.loginToAccess

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed for language switching tests

context_for_next_testing_agent: Language switching bug is FIXED. The i18n configuration was simplified (removed LanguageDetector, using explicit getInitialLng function). All 16 languages are supported. Key test data-testids: language-selector-btn, lang-en, lang-en-GB, lang-fr. localStorage key: i18nextLng.

bug_fix_verification.original_bug: Selecting English (US) or English (UK) did not change the language - interface stayed in French
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: i18n configuration issues with LanguageDetector plugin and fr.json structure mismatch (auth.login was string instead of object)
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Simplified i18n config, fixed fr.json structure, added missing English translations

test_scenarios.scenario: Set localStorage to 'fr', reload, switch to English (US)
test_scenarios.result: PASS - All text changes to English
PASS - Login page displays in English
PASS - Register page displays in English with correct labels and placeholders
PASS - All text returns to French
